documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Ethics agreement for Edgar's Ambassador to El Salvador nomination.

documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Discloses positions outside government including IBM (Executive, $485K salary), Prospect House Media (Founder, $15K-$50K), and Global Conductor Inc. (Management Consulting, $1M-$5M capital gains). Filing reviewed and accepted by agency ethics official.

documents.title: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification for Edgar's Deputy Secretary, Department of Homeland Security role. Marks standard certification sections for ethics-agreement obligations, including resignations, divestitures, transaction reporting, recusals and ethics briefing.

documents.title: Transaction 278T
documents.summary: 278T transaction report for Deputy Secretary role.

documents.title: Certificate of Divestiture
documents.summary: OGE-issued Certificate of Divestiture OGE-2025-048 providing tax-deferral treatment for a qualifying divestiture. Document content is not publicly downloadable from the OGE portal; available via Form 201 request.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Verified against ProPublica's appointee page for Troy Dean Edgar. ProPublica's page embeds 2 unique DocumentCloud disclosure documents; Open Cabinet may list additional OGE-indexed ethics, compliance, certificate, waiver, or request-only records that ProPublica does not expose as separate DocumentCloud PDFs. No contradictory filing record was identified in this check.
